analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet alleges that the US is pursuing destabilization and regime change in Venezuela, invoking the Monroe Doctrine and treating Latin America as its backyard. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) — Supported. The tweet depicts the US as hostile, interventionist, and illegitimately seeking regime change, framing the West (US) as immoral and aggressive. RU2 — Not supported; no claim that Russia leads an alternative system or promotes multilateralism. RU3 — Not supported; no portrayal of Russia as a benevolent partner. RU4 — Not supported; no discussion of Russian history. RU5 — Not supported; no emphasis on Russian achievements. RU6 — Not supported; no cultural or heritage content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
